title: capsid_modulator_pdb_anchor_cross_v1 — CROSS-AXIS A4 anchored CAM row
description: One cross-axis row anchoring the generic CAPSID-ASSEMBLY-MODULATOR (CAM) Zlotnick perturbation model to a single real capsid from the core VIROCAPSID axis's curated PDB corpus. Each row records the corpus capsid's metadata, an HONEST triangulation-number classification, and — only when the native virion is a closed icosahedral shell — the CAM perturbation outcome run at that real T-number. Non-icosahedral native virions (Retroviridae fullerene-cone class, incl. HIV-1) get an honest 'T-number N/A' classification and NO CAM outcome; no T-number is fabricated. In-silico simulator-consistency scope only (AGENTS.tape g1 real-limits-first, g3 honesty-external, g8/f2 in-silico-only, f3 import-not-fork).

pdb_id.description: PDB identifier of the corpus capsid entry.

virus.description: Virus / capsid name as catalogued by the VIROCAPSID corpus.

family.description: Virus family from the VIROCAPSID corpus (may be empty in the literature-curated fallback). Gates t_number_applicable.

corpus_t_number_raw.description: The corpus's raw curator-assigned T-number string (e.g. '1', '3', 'pT3', 'pT25', '7l').

corpus_t_number_declared.description: Integer T-number parsed by the VIROCAPSID corpus from corpus_t_number_raw.

pseudo_t.description: True if the corpus T-number is a pseudo-T (convention-dependent) value.

t_number_applicable.description: True iff the NATIVE virion is a closed icosahedral shell, so Caspar-Klug T and the Zlotnick CAM model legitimately apply. False for non-icosahedral native virions (Retroviridae fullerene cone).

t_number_classification.description: Honest T-number classification: 'T=<n>' or 'T=<n> (pseudo-T)' for closed icosahedral shells; the literal 'N/A — non-icosahedral' for fullerene-cone / non-icosahedral native virions.

t_number_na_reason.description: Present only when t_number_applicable is false: the honest reason no T-number is assigned (non-icosahedral native virion / fullerene cone).

cam_scenario.description: The CAM scenario name applied (a string for icosahedral capsids; null when the CAM model is not applied to a non-icosahedral virion).

cam_outcome.description: The CAM perturbation outcome from the imported capsid_assembly_modulator_sim module, run at the real T-number. Null when t_number_applicable is false (CAM model deliberately not applied).

allOf.description: Closed icosahedral shell: CAM model applied — cam_scenario and cam_outcome must be present.
Non-icosahedral native virion: CAM model NOT applied — cam_scenario / cam_outcome null, honest N/A classification and reason required.
